summary: Issue #490 TikTok Business Advertiser OAuth callback: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. Public GET /v1/auth/tiktok/business/callback without JWT; missing params→400; HMAC state→401; Marketing API exchange→502 on AuthenticationError; encrypted persist with capability=business_advertiser; TIKTOK_BUSINESS_* env separate from Shop Partner; logs use code_len only (no secrets). 9/9 new unit tests + 9 shop regression tests pass.

criticalFindings.description: persist_advertiser_oauth_tokens returns early without error when access_token, refresh_token, or advertiser_id missing after exchange; route may return 200 with advertiser_id_present=false.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Consider 502 when exchange payload lacks required token fields; acceptable deferral for MVP if TikTok always returns complete payloads.

mappings.criterion: Route missing required OAuth code param returns 400 not 5xx
Invalid forged OAuth state rejected with 401
Successful token exchange persists encrypted credentials bound to user state
Shop OAuth regression missing params returns 400 unchanged
Public callback route does not require JWT authorization
Token exchange failure response never leaks access tokens
